trip.title: Empowered Summit NYC
trip.travelers: You + group (group present Thu, Fri after 7PM, Sat until departure)

hotels.name: Holiday Inn Express LIC
hotels.area: Long Island City, near Court Sq

shuttle.note: Free hotel shuttle - PREFERRED. Call to schedule a pickup at the Vernon Blvd-Jackson Av (7 train) station during shuttle hours. Option 2: walk from the station if the shuttle isn't running.

hotels.name: TRYP by Wyndham Times Square South

payment_notes: OMNY only - tap the SAME contactless card or phone for every ride
Same card all trip = free transfers + $35 weekly cap
CASH needed: Wah Fung ($20), Katz's cutter tip ($5 singles)

schedule.theme: Arrival, LIC, Times Square late night

items.activity: Check in / drop bags at Holiday Inn LIC

schedule.theme: Summit day + NYC must-sees after 7 PM

summit.label: Empowered Run Club + Coffee House devotionals

schedule.theme: Closing 11 AM, Group: Gapstow, You: food crawl

items.activity: Group 1: grab bags at Holiday Inn LIC

schedule.theme: Bagels, Primark, Vessel, Central Park, 5th Ave, then JFK

items.activity: Back to TRYP - grab bags & check out

shake_shack.name: Shake Shack (Sunnyside)
shake_shack.order: ShackBurger, crinkle-cut fries, and a shake
shake_shack.notes: Quick burger stop in Sunnyside on the way in from JFK, before the hotel. Classic ShackBurger + fries + a shake.

joes_pizza.name: Joe's Pizza Broadway
joes_pizza.order: Plain cheese or pepperoni slice, fold and walk
joes_pizza.notes: Classic NYC slice in Times Square. $4-5. Cash or card.

hmart.name: H Mart Koreatown
hmart.order: Korean BBQ, bibimbap, tteokbokki, kimchi pancake
hmart.notes: Food court upstairs. Pay each vendor separately. 5 min from TRYP.

wah_fung.name: Wah Fung No.1 Fast Food
wah_fung.notes: CASH ONLY. CLOSES 7 PM - arrive by 6. Near Grand St (B/D).

katz.name: Katz's Delicatessen
katz.address: 205 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
katz.notes: Tip the cutter cash for a taste. DON'T lose your ticket ($50).

vessel.name: The Vessel (Hudson Yards)
vessel.notes: The honeycomb climbable structure at Hudson Yards. 7 train to 34 St-Hudson Yards.

central_park.name: Central Park
central_park.address: Grand Army Plaza, 5th Ave & 59th St, New York, NY 10019
central_park.notes: Entered at the southeast corner by Grand Army Plaza, then walked down 5th Ave.

fifth_ave.name: 5th Avenue
fifth_ave.address: 5th Ave & E 57th St, New York, NY 10022
fifth_ave.notes: The flagship-store stretch of 5th Ave, walking south from Central Park toward Trump Tower.

trump_tower.name: Trump Tower
trump_tower.notes: 725 5th Ave - the public atrium on 5th Avenue.

bagels.name: Best Bagel & Coffee
bagels.order: Classic bagel with cream cheese (or bacon-egg-cheese)
bagels.notes: Beloved no-frills NYC bagel spot near TRYP - hand-rolled, often a line but fast. The proper NYC bagel before you fly.

primark.name: Primark Herald Square
primark.notes: Huge, ultra-affordable fashion flagship across from Herald Square - 2 blocks from TRYP. Great for cheap clothes and souvenirs. Opened May 2026; double-check the Sunday opening time.

ichiran.name: Ichiran Times Square
ichiran.order: Tonkotsu ramen, customize on the order sheet
ichiran.notes: Solo-booth ramen concept - order on the sheet at your booth. ~$20-25/bowl.

times_square.name: Times Square
times_square.notes: #1 first-timer sight, best after dark. Walk the pedestrian plazas 42nd-47th.

rockefeller.name: Rockefeller Center
rockefeller.notes: Plaza with Atlas & Prometheus statues. N/W to 49 St, 3 min walk.

gapstow.name: Gapstow Bridge
gapstow.address: Gapstow Bridge, Central Park, New York, NY 10019
gapstow.notes: Postcard Central Park view - stone bridge over the Pond, Midtown skyline behind. N/W to 5 Av/59 St, 5 min walk. Best photo from south side looking north.

tkts_steps.name: TKTS Red Steps
tkts_steps.address: Father Duffy Square, Broadway & W 47th St, New York, NY 10036
tkts_steps.notes: The glowing red glass staircase above the TKTS booth. Climb up for the iconic elevated photo over the Times Square lights. Free, right where you already are.

candy_stores.name: M&M's World & Hershey's
candy_stores.notes: Three neon-lit floors of M&M's right on Times Square, with Hershey's Chocolate World a block away. Free to wander, fun for first-timers, open late - grab candy if you want a souvenir.

grand_central.name: Grand Central Terminal
grand_central.notes: Breathtaking Beaux-Arts main hall with the turquoise celestial ceiling. Free and open late. Bonus: the 7 train from here runs straight back to LIC (Court Sq).

wtc_memorial.name: 9/11 Memorial pools
wtc_memorial.notes: The twin reflecting pools in the Twin Towers' footprints, names lit from within. Closes 8 PM - head straight here after summit. In June it's a serene dusk visit (not fully dark). Direct E from Court Sq to World Trade Center.

oculus.name: The Oculus (WTC)
oculus.notes: The soaring white winged structure beside the Memorial - stunning lit up at night, and unlike the Memorial it stays open late. This is where you get the WTC-at-night beauty.

levain_noho.name: Levain Bakery (NoHo)
levain_noho.order: Chocolate chip walnut cookie (the hockey puck)
levain_noho.notes: Levain's NoHo shop, open till 11 PM - about 5 min walk from the Prince St station. Grab the famous giant cookies on the way uptown.

jfk_to_lic.title: JFK to Holiday Inn LIC
steps: After bags, follow AirTrain signs (upper level, any terminal)
AirTrain toward JAMAICA STATION, tap card on exit ($8.75)
Follow signs to E train (Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av)
E train toward Manhattan, tap card ($3)
Ride to COURT SQ-23 ST (~25 min), walk to hotel
jfk_to_lic.note: The E is the only subway to JFK's AirTrain at Jamaica. Hotel shuttle (preferred): during 7-11 AM or 5-9 PM, take the 7 to Vernon Blvd-Jackson Av and call 347-617-1660 for a free pickup. Option 2: walk from Court Sq.

melrose_to_timessq.title: Melrose Ballroom to Times Square
steps: Walk to 39 Av-Dutch Kills station (N/W), ~5 min
N or W train toward Manhattan / Coney Island
Ride to TIMES SQ-42 ST (~6 stops)
Joe's Pizza is 1 block away at 1435 Broadway
melrose_to_timessq.note: Return: N/W from Times Sq back to 39 Av-Dutch Kills (toward Astoria).

melrose_to_wtc.title: Melrose Ballroom to 9/11 Memorial (World Trade Center)
steps: Leave right at the 7 PM close - the Memorial shuts at 8 PM
Walk to Court Sq-23 St station
E train toward Manhattan (World Trade Center is the last stop)
Ride to WORLD TRADE CENTER (~25 min), the Memorial is right there
melrose_to_wtc.note: Go straight here first; everything else (Levain, Grand Central, Ichiran, Rockefeller) is north and stays open later. Return at the end: N/W from Times Square back to LIC.

melrose_to_gapstow.title: Melrose Ballroom to Gapstow Bridge
steps: Walk to 39 Av-Dutch Kills station (N/W), ~5 min
N or W train toward Manhattan
Ride to 5 AV/59 ST (~4 stops)
Walk 5 min into Central Park's SE corner to Gapstow Bridge
melrose_to_gapstow.note: 5 Av/59 St is closest to Gapstow, by the Plaza Hotel. Return: N/W back to 39 Av-Dutch Kills for bags.

lic_to_jfk_group.title: GROUP 1: LIC to JFK (Saturday departure)
steps: From hotel, walk to Court Sq-23 St station
E train toward Jamaica (toward Queens, NOT Manhattan)
Ride to SUTPHIN BLVD-ARCHER AV-JFK (~20 min)
Follow AirTrain signs, AirTrain to Terminal 4, tap ($8.75)
lic_to_jfk_group.note: Leaving LIC by 1:15 PM puts them at JFK ~2:30 PM. Lots of buffer for a 7 PM flight.

lic_to_tryp.title: YOU: LIC to TRYP Times Square
steps: From hotel, walk to Court Sq-23 St (E) or Queensboro Plaza (7)
E to Times Sq area, or 7 train to Times Sq-42 St
Walk to TRYP by Wyndham (W 36th St area)

food_crawl.title: Food crawl: TRYP to H Mart to Wah Fung to Katz's
steps: TRYP to H Mart: walk 5 min to 38 W 32nd St
H Mart to Wah Fung: B/D from 34 St-Herald Sq to GRAND ST (~6 stops)
Walk 5 min to 79 Chrystie St (closes 7 PM, arrive by 6)
Wah Fung to Katz's: walk 4 blocks to 205 E Houston St
Katz's to TRYP: Uber (~$25) or F train 2 Av to 34 St-Herald Sq

tryp_to_jfk.title: TRYP to JFK
steps: Walk to Penn Station (~5 min from TRYP)
Buy LIRR ticket to JAMAICA at machine ($5.25 off-peak)
Board train labeled 'Jamaica', ~18 min
At Jamaica, follow AirTrain signs, AirTrain to Terminal 4, tap ($8.75)
tryp_to_jfk.note: Backup: A/C/E or taxi. Uber from TRYP to JFK is $70-90 + tolls, 45-75 min.

group_highlights.note: The #1 first-timer sight, best after dark. Already there for Joe's Pizza.
Go straight here after summit - the Memorial pools (free) close at 8 PM. The Oculus next door is free, open late, and stunning lit up at night.
The plaza with the Atlas & Prometheus statues, beautiful lit up at night. Last stop before heading home.
Free, open late, and the celestial-ceiling main hall is a true first-timer wow. The 7 train from here runs straight back to LIC.
Postcard Central Park view. Quick 30 min via N/W to 5 Av/59 St, then group heads to JFK from the Queens side.

1.name: Group 1 (leaves Saturday)
1.description: Shares Thursday and Friday, does Gapstow Bridge Saturday morning, then departs JFK Saturday evening.

2.name: Group 2 (stays through Sunday)
2.description: Shares Thursday and Friday, does Gapstow Saturday morning, then continues to TRYP + food crawl Saturday and the full Sunday before departing.
